allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Move neo-tree keymaps to plugin spec and fix lua_ls vim global

- Add vim to lua_ls diagnostics.globals to suppress undefined global warning
- Move neo-tree keymaps to plugin keys field for better organization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Migrate LSP config to Neovim 0.11 native API

Use vim.lsp.config\(\) and vim.lsp.enable\(\) instead of mason-lspconfig
handlers. Remove redundant grn/gra keymaps \(now 0.11 built-in defaults\)
and drop the 0.10 client_supports_method compat shim.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
